title: security.delete_role

refresh.description: If `true` (the default) then refresh the affected shards to make this operation visible to search, if `wait_for` then wait for a refresh to make this operation visible to search, if `false` then do nothing with refreshes.

description:
Delete roles.

Delete roles in the native realm.
The role management APIs are generally the preferred way to manage roles, rather than using file-based role management.
The delete roles API cannot remove roles that are defined in roles files.
